About Me

Who I Am

Hi, I'm Adarsh Singh — a passionate Full-Stack & Mobile Developer and M.Sc Computer Science graduate from Pondicherry University (2026). I love building elegant, production-quality applications that solve real problems.

My skill set spans web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript), cross-platform mobile apps with Flutter, machine learning with Python & scikit-learn, and even quantum computing fundamentals with Qiskit.

I'm also an active competitive programmer, having solved 150+ DSA problems on LeetCode and GeeksforGeeks, focusing on FAANG-style patterns.

University Campus Mart
A full-stack cross-platform mobile marketplace for university students — buy, sell & rent resources with real-time chat, price negotiation/bidding, wishlist, seller profiles and multi-photo listings. Built with Flutter & Supabase.
